task: Showcase-grade advanced task: OIDC CI Token Compromise Blast Radius and Cloud Control Regression Pack. Reality context: a cloud platform team discovered a stolen CI OIDC token minutes before a production deploy freeze and needs a precise blast-radius reconstruction plus policy regression tests before re-enabling automation. removed context excerpt: NIST incident-response guidance emphasizes analyzing incident data and determining appropriate response; zero-trust and cloud IAM practices require explicit policy evaluation rather than assuming network trust. Embedded packet: compromised_subject=repo:payments/api:ref:refs/heads/release; token_iat=2026-06-17T10:12:04Z token_exp=10:57:04Z; federation_rules: R1 role=ci-payments-prod condition repo=payments/api branch=release aud=sts max_session_min=45 policies=deploy_payments,read_payment_params,pass_payments_task,assume_debug_if_ticket; R2 role=ci-analytics-dev condition repo=analytics/etl branch=* aud=sts policies=deploy_dev,read_dev_secrets; R3 role=breakglass-observer condition mfa=true policies=read_all_logs; policy_details: deploy_payments allows ecs:UpdateService cluster=prod-payments services=api,worker; read_payment_params allows ssm:GetParameter path=/prod/payments/* except tag:data_class=cardholder; pass_payments_task allows iam:PassRole role=payments-task only when passed_to=ecs-tasks; assume_debug_if_ticket allows sts:AssumeRole role=payments-runtime-debug only when ticket_tag matches INC-[0-9]+; observed_events: E1 10:14:18 ssm:GetParameter /prod/payments/db_password tag=customer_data result=Success source_ip=198.51.100.17, E2 10:16:03 ssm:GetParameter /prod/payments/card_processor_key tag=cardholder result=Denied, E3 10:19:44 ecs:UpdateService prod-payments/api desired_count 18->22 result=Success, E4 10:22:11 sts:AssumeRole payments-runtime-debug ticket_tag=missing result=Denied, E5 10:31:09 iam:PassRole payments-task passed_to=ecs-tasks result=Success, E6 10:43:20 ssm:GetParameter /prod/payments/refund_hmac tag=customer_data result=Success; resource_weights cardholder=100 customer_data=75 production_availability=55 privilege_escalation_enabler=65; containment_options: C1 disable_federation_provider impact_min=38 closes_all_roles, C2 pin_subject_to_signed_tag impact=14 blocks_branch_subjects, C3 deny_prod_payment_params impact=0 blocks_secret_reads, C4 remove_passrole impact=19 blocks_deploy, C5 rotate_customer_data_params impact=6 reduces_confirmed_secret_residual_by=80%; max_customer_impact_min=25. Rules and constraints: an action is allowed only if subject matches a federation rule, policy allows it, and no exception denies it; confirmed exposure requires Success; potential exposure includes allowed actions not observed before token_exp; residual_severity=sum(weight for confirmed/potential exposures not neutralized by containment), with confirmed secrets weighted 1.0 and potential exposures weighted 0.35; choose containment set with impact<=25 minimizing residual severity, then write regression tests for each observed allow/deny boundary. Required work: deliver cloud_oidc_blast_radius.md + iam_regression_tests.yaml with event allow/deny matrix, confirmed/potential exposure table, containment optimizer, chosen response, evidence gaps, and at least ten deterministic policy tests. Use only the packet; do not assume access to live cloud accounts.
